deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip via Homestead Vested. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42-62K. Close May 1 2026. CMA: 31 comps, avg $207K, est value $266K.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report; feed to Sirhc for analysis sheet template

logs.m: Investor sent deal via link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage development opportunity. Listing canceled. Signs picked up. Isaac Linares development interest ($150K mobile home project) did not move forward. Sisters wanted to end listing after March.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Walking away. Signs retrieved.
Isaac discussed mobile home development concept. Sisters enthusiastic but project stalled.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3/2 home, 2972 sqft, built 1994. Underwater by $93-143K. VA loan $486K balance at 5.25%. Sellers moving back in. Plan to relist after updates and repairs.
deals.next: Termination release signed. Relationship intact. Listing may resume later.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in to make updates and repairs. Plan to relist later.
Call with Matt and Chandler. Chandler was laid off. Short sale most likely path forward. Relationship intact.
Full market analysis sent. Carrying costs $5300-6000/mo. Three paths presented: short sale, assumption, or bring cash to close.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3/2.5 home, 1886 sqft, 2011 build. Listed $259,900. Sellers moving to NC second week June. June deadline high urgency. Second-look buyers are hottest lead.
deals.next: Confirm May 30 showing time. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back. Their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled to May 30.
Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed. Keeping conversation open with Jose and Katy.
MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing feedback received.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3/2 home, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres, Frio County. Payoff $257K (Feb 2026). Divorce situation. CMA recommends $295K list price. Net to sellers varies by list price.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578. CMA pulled. Net sheet built. Meeting went well.
Prior clients from VA loan purchase. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank foreclosure. Contractor: HouzzPro/Matt Toney ($54,877). Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Drywall complete, second paint round finishing. Water meter pending 1-2 days.
deals.next: Confirm electric meter install status. Call EMCSUD for water service. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Visited property. 3 cameras installed. Electric reconnected. Drywall complete, paint finishing. Flooring starts tomorrow. Water meter 1-2 days.
Drywall crew patching remaining holes. Sent photos to Kelly. Mileage approved for ACH payment.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract Espinoza buyers at $113K. Buyer agent: Javier. Chicago Title: Alyssa Castillo. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment pending.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: New buyers: Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. Another agent called with backup offer.
Steve signed amendment. TXR 1404 uploaded. MLS updated to $117,500. Commission box correction still needed.
Clearing complete. Steve finished job. Photos sent. Drone footage flagged as priority.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale. Cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded Apr 26-27 2026. Lien blocker resolved via Fernando Castillo signature Apr 21.
deals.next: Deliver joy gift basket. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Thank Chelsey Bongiovi and notary Michael.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Delivered to Chicago Title.
Joyce sent lien bypass form. Lien holder can sign to skip 45-day wait.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Military retirement + daughters disability income. Paying $1700/mo rent. Fixing credit on own. Motivated. VA loan eligible zero down. Between jobs. Call today May 14.
leads.next: Call today. Connect with VA lender. Qualify timeline, budget, target area.

logs.m: Flagged to call today. Overdue since Apr 30. Do not let slip again.
Spoke today. Sick grandkid. Follow up tomorrow.
Confirmed military retirement plus daughters live with her. Follow-up text sent.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Out of Corpus deal. Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA firm requirement. Rate buydowns and incentives angle. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal via Isaac.
leads.next: Confirm Zach pre-approval status. Follow up after Isaac phone call. Revisit new construction search if Saxet falls through.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet. Too much for them. Still actively searching.
New direction: 301 W Saxet Corpus Christi at $85K. Wholesale via Isaac. FHA 203k financing angle.
Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy. New construction search platform.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing story through plants. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential long term.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story for content. Keep nurturing.

logs.m: Community contact through garden share group. Healing through gardens story.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Helping get started in real estate. Two opportunities: mom Milagros (buyer, new construction, $50K down, ~$1000/mo target) and uncle Jimbo rental setup. Builder registration critical on first visit.
leads.next: Confirm visit date with Brandon and Milagros. Call Carlos McLean 210-605-0241 before Grace Gardens visit. Get Milagros signed before builder visit.

logs.m: Reached out to builders. Multiple options pulling inventory keeping payments ~$1000/mo.
Buyer rep sent to Milagros. Not yet signed.
Met at 8527 Green Bliss. Chris offered PM options this week.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Met at 181 CR 7751 job site. Wife is active military VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Currently renting in San Antonio area. Looking to purchase.
leads.next: Get contact info from Bryce. Confirm wife VA eligibility branch and service status. Connect with VA lender.

logs.m: Met on-site at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military. Recently moved from Ohio, renting.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo. Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property. Understand financing and work needed.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Details pending on buyer and fixer property situation.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Met in person. Investor interested. Buy box unknown. Likely Schertz area. Full intake still needed.
leads.next: Full Sage intake. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy flip vs hold.

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. No further details yet.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. Son not yet contacted. Probate or sale potential.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat. Reach out to son. Lead with neighbor and gardener angle first.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor may have passed. Son owns house now. Avid gardener.
